headline: SIS Unveils Fixed-Price ERP Implementation Program for Mid-Sized Specialty Contractors
summary: With over 25 years of expertise in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (A/E/C) sectors, SIS, LLC—a top Microsoft Dynamics 365 partner—has introduced its Fixed-Price ERP Implementation Program. This specially designed Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance solution meets the needs of mid-sized specialty contractors, offering simplified operations, better financial oversight, and strong cost management with the certainty of a fixed price as well as dramatically reduced time to value.

headline: Netflix Is Being Misunderstood By Investors — Again. Why the 9% Dip Looks More Like an Opportunity Than a Warning

headline: Microsoft Lawsuit Tests Cloud Pricing As Industrial AI Partnerships Expand
summary: Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) is facing a mass lawsuit in the UK that alleges it overcharged for Windows Server licenses on rival cloud platforms. A London tribunal has authorized the class action, which could cover nearly 60,000 UK businesses using Windows Server outside Azure. The case emerges as Microsoft promotes new AI and industrial platform partnerships that are being showcased in connection with Hannover Messe 2026.
